# word-count

A small utility that counts words in a text file.

## Install

Clone the repo. Requires Python 3.10+.

## Use

```bash
python -m wordcount path/to/file.txt
```

Prints the word count to stdout.

## Status

Early. The team has only just started this project. There is no test
suite yet and no continuous integration. Contributions welcome —
please open an issue first.
